body: # Best AI Investments: Stocks, ETFs, and Strategies for Smart Investors. # Best AI Investments: Stocks, ETFs, and Strategies for Smart Investors. The key to stock investing is diversification—don’t go all-in on one AI company just because it looks promising. Using AI to Invest Smarter. One of our standout offerings is the **Artificial Intelligence Innovators Thematic Strategy**—a long-term investment approach designed to capitalize on the rapid growth and innovation within AI. ### Why AI-Driven Investing Makes Sense. AI-powered investing strategies can be a game-changer, especially for those who don’t have the time (or patience) to manually analyze stocks and market trends. AI investments come with risks, including market volatility and ethical concerns, but the long-term potential for business transformation makes it an attractive option. ## Why invest in AI? ### Focus areas for AI investment. # Investing in AI stocks: What to know before starting | Fidelity. Investing in AI stocks: What to know before starting | Fidelity. # Investing in AI stocks. Before making an AI-related investment, it’s important to do your research on the individual stocks, funds, and the products that your broker offers. If you’ve decided you want to make an AI-related investment, you’ll want to evaluate buying individual stocks or funds, such as exchange traded funds (ETFs) or mutual funds. If you're new to Fidelity or are already saving through a retirement account such as a 401(k), you might also want to open a brokerage account as another way to invest your money. After you make the investment, check back every now and then to monitor how your AI stock or funds are performing. Conducting thorough research and staying informed about market trends and regulatory developments can help investors make informed decisions and navigate the complexities of AI stock investments.
